text: Aaj team meeting mein Boss ne sabke samne meri bezatti ki aur kaha ki mujh jaise UPSC failure se yahi umeed thi, tab se mera dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai. Main bas roye ja raha hoon aur wahi purane dropper stigma wale din yaad aa rahe hain, kuch bhi solution sochna namumkin lag raha hai. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki mujhe lag raha hai meri saari koshish mitti mein mil gayi.

Meeting mein Boss ke chillaane ke baad se main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon, dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Papa ne kisan hokar apni sari jama-pungi meri coaching mein laga di thi aur ab is humiliation ne mujhe poori tarah tod diya hai. Main is waqt koi career backup ya layoff ke baare mein soch hi nahi pa rahi, bas rone ka mann kar raha hai.

Boss ne sabke samne layoff ki dhamki di toh mera dil itni buri tarah toot gaya ki hostel ke bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi. Pehle hi sarkari naukri na nikalne ka dukh tha, aur ab is bezatti ne mujhe poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar bana diya hai. Dimaag mein bas wahi taane goonj rahe hain aur main bas sunn hokar leti hoon, aage ka kuch sujhh nahi raha.

Aaj ki meeting ke baad se main itna ghut raha hoon ki saans lena bhi bojh lag raha hai, dimaag mein bas wahi 'UPSC dropper' wali baatein chal rahi hain. Ghar ki EMI aur coaching ka karz kaise chukega ye baad ki baat hai, pehle ye jo rona ruk nahi raha usne mujhe duba diya hai. Is waqt main koi solution dhoondne ke layak hi nahi bacha, bas lag raha hai ki main sabke liye ek bojh hoon.

Boss ne team ke samne meri sarkari naukri ki purani mehnat ka mazaak udaya aur tabhi se main bas sunn hokar baitha hoon. MNC ki ye job mere parivaar ki 'izzat' thi, par ab is humiliation ne mujhe itna flood kar diya hai ki main laptop kholne ki soch bhi nahi sakta. Main bas ek loop mein fasa hoon jahan sirf dard aur nakami mehsus ho rahi hai, baki sab dhundhla gaya hai.
